headline: COIN Broadens Reach Beyond Crypto Trading to Be "Everything Exchange"
summary: Coinbase is expanding beyond crypto trading with tokenized equities, AI-agent payments, pre-IPO exposure and U.S. crypto derivatives.

headline: How Is Interactive Brokers' Stock Performance Compared to Other Capital Markets Stocks?
summary: As Interactive Brokers has exceeded its industry peers over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a strongly optimistic outlook on its prospects.

headline: Is Interactive Brokers (IBKR) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Interactive Brokers (IBKR). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: StoneX Is Tapping AI, Trading Volatility and Global Expansion
summary: SNEX is leveraging AI, trading volatility and acquisitions to broaden its platform, but margin pressure and premium valuation remain key risks.

headline: SNEX Stock Outlook Hinges on Scale, Volatility and Deal Execution
summary: StoneX's scale story is backed by acquisitions and broad client activity, but margin pressure, rates, expenses and credit costs keep risks in focus.
